1 import { skeuoStyle } from '../styles';
2 import { useSlotBehavior } from './useSlotBehavior';
3 import type { SlotRenderProps } from './useSlotBehavior';
4 import type { ReactNode, Ref } from 'react';
5 
6 interface SlotProps {
7   index: number;
8   as?: 'li' | 'span' | 'div';
9   className?: string;
10   children: (props: SlotRenderProps) => ReactNode;
11 }
12 
13 export const Slot = ({
14   index,
15   as: Tag = 'li',
16   className,
17   children,
18 }: SlotProps) => {
19   const {
20     renderProps,
21     outerRef,
22     slotRef,
23     dragRef,
24     handleClick,
25     pointerHandlers,
26     isBeingDragged,
27   } = useSlotBehavior(index);
28 
29   const {
30     label,
31     isEmpty,
32     isWrong,
33     showCursor,
34     isPreview,
35     previewLabel,
36   } = renderProps;
37 
38   // When the slot is used inline (as="span", e.g. SentenceWithGaps inside <p>),
39   // the inner visual element must also be a <span> to avoid invalid
40   // block-in-inline HTML nesting. For list/block contexts, <div> is correct.
41   const InnerTag = Tag === 'span' ? 'span' : 'div';
42 
43   const ariaLabel = isEmpty
44     ? `Slot ${index + 1}, empty`
45     : `Slot ${index + 1}, filled with ${label}`;
46 
47   const stateClasses = [
48     'relative flex items-center justify-center border-2 transition-all overflow-hidden',
49     isPreview
50       ? 'border-dashed border-primary'
51       : isEmpty
52         ? 'border-border'
53         : isWrong
54           ? 'border-destructive bg-destructive/10 text-destructive'
55           : 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary',
56     // Focus ring on active slot (driven by showCursor, works in all modes)
57     showCursor && isWrong
58       ? 'ring-2 ring-destructive ring-offset-2'
59       : showCursor
60         ? 'border-primary ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2'
61         : '',
62   ]
63     .filter(Boolean)
64     .join(' ');
65 
66   return (
67     // Outer wrapper: the drop target. p-1.5 expands the hit area ~6 px beyond
68     // the visual slot on all sides (pragmatic-board card pattern). data-zone-index
69     // here ensures touch elementsFromPoint also covers the expanded region.
70     <Tag
71       ref={
72         outerRef as Ref<
73           HTMLLIElement & HTMLSpanElement & HTMLDivElement
74         >
75       }
76       aria-label={ariaLabel}
77       data-zone-index={index}
78       className="relative p-1.5"
79     >
80       {/* Inner visual slot: carries the state-dependent styling. */}
81       <InnerTag
82         ref={slotRef as Ref<HTMLDivElement>}
83         className={[stateClasses, className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')}
84         style={
85           isPreview
86             ? { animation: 'pulse-ring 1.5s ease-in-out infinite' }
87             : undefined
88         }
89       >
90         {isEmpty ? (
91           <>
92             {isPreview && previewLabel !== null ? (
93               <span className="text-xl font-bold opacity-50">
94                 {previewLabel}
95               </span>
96             ) : (
97               children(renderProps)
98             )}
99             {showCursor ? (
100               <span
101                 aria-hidden="true"
102                 className="pointer-events-none absolute bottom-2 left-1/2 h-0.5 w-7 -translate-x-1/2 rounded-sm bg-primary animate-blink"
103               />
104             ) : null}
105           </>
106         ) : (
107           <>
108             <div
109               className="absolute inset-0 bg-muted/60 shadow-inner"
110               aria-hidden="true"
111             />
112             <button
113               ref={dragRef}
114               type="button"
115               className={`absolute inset-0 flex touch-none select-none cursor-grab items-center justify-center rounded-[inherit] text-card-foreground${isBeingDragged && !isPreview ? ' invisible pointer-events-none' : ''}${isPreview ? ' opacity-50' : ''}`}
116               aria-hidden={
117                 isBeingDragged && !isPreview ? 'true' : undefined
118               }
119               style={skeuoStyle}
120               onClick={handleClick}
121               onPointerDown={pointerHandlers.onPointerDown}
122               onPointerMove={pointerHandlers.onPointerMove}
123               onPointerUp={pointerHandlers.onPointerUp}
124               onPointerCancel={pointerHandlers.onPointerCancel}
125             >
126               {isPreview && previewLabel !== null ? (
127                 <span className="text-xl font-bold">
128                   {previewLabel}
129                 </span>
130               ) : (
131                 children(renderProps)
132               )}
133             </button>
134             {showCursor ? (
135               <span
136                 aria-hidden="true"
137                 className="pointer-events-none absolute bottom-2 left-1/2 h-0.5 w-7 -translate-x-1/2 rounded-sm bg-destructive animate-blink"
138               />
139             ) : null}
140           </>
141         )}
142       </InnerTag>
143     </Tag>
144   );
145 };
146
```

213               prompt={String(round.value)}
214             />
215           ) : (
216             <TextQuestion text={questionText} />
217           )}
218           <AudioButton prompt={ttsPrompt} />
219         </AnswerGame.Question>
220         <AnswerGame.Answer>
221           <SlotRow className="gap-4">
222             {zones.map((zone, i) => (
223               <Slot key={zone.id} index={i} className={slotClass}>
224                 {({ label }) => {
225                   if (!label) return null;
226                   if (dotsDominoMode) {
227                     const n = Number.parseInt(label, 10);
228                     if (!Number.isNaN(n)) {
229                       return <DominoTile value={n} />;
230                     }
231                   }
232                   if (wordMode) {
233                     return (
234                       <span
235                         className={[
236                           'block text-center font-bold leading-tight hyphens-auto break-words',
237                           label.length > 6 ? 'text-sm' : 'text-xl',
238                         ].join(' ')}
239                       >
240                         {label}
241                       </span>
242                     );
243                   }
244                   return (
245                     <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums">
246                       {label}
247                     </span>
248                   );
249                 }}
250               </Slot>
251             ))}
252           </SlotRow>
253         </AnswerGame.Answer>
254         <AnswerGame.Choices>
255           <NumeralTileBank
256             tileStyle={tileStyle}
257             tilesShowGroup={tilesShowGroup}
258           />
259         </AnswerGame.Choices>
260       </div>
261       <ScoreAnimation visible={confettiReady} />
262       {gameOverReady ? (
263         <GameOverOverlay
264           retryCount={retryCount}
265           onPlayAgain={handlePlayAgain}
266           onHome={handleHome}
267         />
268       ) : null}
269     </>
270   );
271 };
272

274   config,
275   initialState,
276   sessionId,
277   seed,
278 }: NumberMatchProps) => {
